hero.badge: Training company of HAK Zell am See
hero.description: Your platform for gaming and technology. We simulate real business processes and provide innovative solutions.
about.title: About TecTronics
about.description: As a training company of HAK Zell am See, we simulate realistic business processes and provide students with the opportunity to gain practical experience in a safe learning environment.
about.missionDescription: We create a realistic learning environment where theory and practice merge. Through the simulation of real business processes, we prepare our participants optimally for the demands of the modern working world.
about.cards.quality.title: Quality & Innovation
about.cards.quality.description: We strive for the highest quality and continuous improvement in all areas.
about.cards.teamwork.title: Teamwork
about.cards.teamwork.description: Collaboration and mutual support are the foundation of our success.
about.cards.learning.title: Practice-Oriented Learning
about.cards.learning.description: Simulating real business processes while gaining valuable experience.
about.cards.sustainability.title: Sustainability
about.cards.sustainability.description: Predominantly paperless workflows for a better future.
